name: Machine-Selection-Guide-V2.docx
content:
How do I choose the right C.E. King machine for my needs?

The right machine depends on what you are counting or filling, your required production speed, your application industry, and the specific characteristics of your product. The C.E. King sales team can recommend the best solution based on your requirements, and trial testing with your own product samples is available.

Details

  • For counting tablets or capsules (semi-automatic, low to medium volume): King Dispenser RX — handles tablets 7mm–15mm, capsules up to size 0E, feed rates up to 1,000 pieces/min depending on product size
  • For automatic tablet/capsule counting (medium volume): King Technocount T8
  • For automatic tablet/capsule counting (high volume): King Technocount T12, T16, or T24
  • For liquid filling (bench-top, semi-automatic, 10ml–5 litres): King Technofill F1 Pro — servo-driven gear pump with 1% dosing accuracy, Industry 4.0 ready
  • For liquid filling (higher throughput, dual head): King Technofill F2
  • For capping bottles: King Capper range (ROPP, screw, or press-on)
  • For complete filling lines: C.E. King can supply integrated counting, filling, capping, and labelling systems
  • Key information to provide when requesting a recommendation: product type (tablet, capsule, liquid), product dimensions and properties, required output per minute or per hour, bottle/container sizes and neck openings, industry (pharma, nutraceutical, food, cosmetic), and destination country
  • Actual machine output depends on product characteristics including tablet size, shape, friability, dynamic behaviour, and the coefficient of friction — trial testing with your product is recommended
  • The Technofill F1 Pro accommodates different viscosities from water-like to thick oils with interchangeable pump sizes (1.5, 6, 10, or 17 litres per minute)
  • Feeder ring tooling, dispensing funnels, and nozzle assemblies can be matched to your specific product and container requirements
  • Contact sales@ceking.com or use the website chat for a guided recommendation
  • Demonstration videos available at youtube.com/@cekinglimited
